SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_INP_COINS_2M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2013. It will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design 
with extra coverage in the gap. The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit 
(ICL) for the Part D benefit. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a
